basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable by 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Woman and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M. E./M. Tech. in Metallurgy, Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Engineering, Materials Science, Mechanical Engineering, Applied Mechanics, Aerospace Engineering, Ceramics Engineering, or allied discipline. M.Sc. in Physics/ Chemistry/Materials Science/ Mathematics from a recognized University/ Institute with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale (55% marks or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD) with valid GATE/NET.

selection_process: Walk-in interview Physical documents verification at the time of joining
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIEST Shibpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIEST Shibpur is July 08, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.E./M.Tech. or M.Sc. degree in relevant disciplines from a recognized university with the specified minimum marks and valid GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years, with relaxations available for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a walk-in interview, followed by physical document verification at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 48,100/- per month, which includes basic pay and HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the type of job being offered?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job opportunity for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIEST Shibpur located?
faq.answer: IIEST Shibpur is located in Shibpur, West Bengal, with the pincode 711103.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is MT 1937.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be sent via email for the application?
faq.answer: You need to send a soft copy of your application letter, recent bio-data, mark sheets, and self-attested certificates via email.
